title: Abhishek Sankar - Software engineer exploring AI agents
textSample: Abhishek Sankar Artificial Intelligence @ CMU Prev. Applied AI @ BNY AI Hub, Engineering @ Providence Health I'm a graduate student at Carnegie Mellon University studying Artificial Intelligence. I'm interested in efforts toward systems that make English the main programming language. Previously, I worked as an Applied AI engineer at the Bank of New York, where I played around with coding agents.
